nasb.text: Then nations set against him On every side from their provinces, And they spread their net over him; He was captured in their pit.

esv.text: Then the nations set against him from provinces on every side; they spread their net over him; he was taken in their pit.

cnv.text: 於是四圍的列國 從各地來攻擊牠， 把他們的網撒在牠身上， 把牠困在他們的坑中。

ccb.text: 于是，列国便从四面围攻它， 设网罗捕捉它。 它落入他们的陷阱。
